name: 迷路会社 | Maze Company
short_description: A short horror walking simulator where you just head from the workroom to the exit. Something may happen along the way, but don't worry, just keep going.Your goal is to return.
detailed_description:
Your business is finished.

Let's get out of here as soon as possible.

Company rules

  • No running in the office

  • Follow the rules of the road

  • At ○○, don't turn around and go straight ahead.

Punish those who do not follow the rules.

Game Description

This game is a short walking simulator.

Walk through the company and head for the exit.

That is the only objective.

Something may happen along the way, but don't worry about it.

As long as you follow the rules.

【Playing time】

About 10 to 30 minutes.

If you want to collect all endings, it will take about 1  to 2 hour.

【Operation Methods】

WASD, arrow keys: Move

WASD key, arrow keys + Shift key: Run

E key: Interact

Tab key: Open/close inventory

Arrow keys: Switch items in inventory

Esc key: Show/hide menu screen

Operation instructions are also provided in the game.

【Rules for Live Streaming and Distribution】

  • Anyone is welcome to play and stream the game (no permission is required).

  • Monetization through distribution is also acceptable for both corporations and individuals.

  • We would appreciate it if you include the name of the game in the title of the video or streaming video, and a link to the Steam store page in the summary section.

  • Posting or live distribution of content that is offensive to public order and morals or that significantly damages the value of the game is prohibited.

  • We will not be held responsible for any damages incurred by the publisher or any third party as a result of posting or live distribution of videos.

  • The above terms and conditions are subject to change without notice.
